title: Anyone have or know where to get Chronicles Side A
display_title: Anyone have or know where to get Chronicles Side A
wikitext: []: Anyone have or know where to get Chronicles Side A?             Quote Post by hamstercactus » Sun Jul 31, 2022 5:12 am Hi all. I'm looking for Chronicles side A but can't find it anywhere in english. It seems to have disappeared entirely. Anyone know where to get it, or have one they want to sell? I have a couple of the monthly chronicle volumes in Japanese but were they ever released in english? Also regarding the Gkidz bluray ultimate version, is it true that only 5000 have been made? Some of the copies I see on ebay are completely trashed and I wonder why buy something so rare to treat it with so little respect.
